headline: Hardware & Infrastructure Stocks Q1 Highlights: HP (NYSE:HPQ)
summary: The end of the earnings season is always a good time to take a step back and see who shined (and who didn’t). Let’s take a look at how hardware & infrastructure stocks fared in Q1, starting with HP (NYSE:HPQ).

headline: Do Diversification and AI Strategy Power Lenovo's Long-Term Growth?
summary: Lenovo's AI PCs, infrastructure investments and expanding services support long-term growth despite tariffs, costs and geopolitical uncertainty.

headline: 4 Overlooked Dividend Stocks Yielding 4%+ to Buy in July
summary: The S&P 500 barely yields 2%, yet four stocks hiding in plain sight across airlines, semiconductors, PCs, and consumer electronics are paying well above 4% with the cash flow to back it up. Most dividend investors never think to look here.

headline: The Zacks Analyst Blog Highlights Lenovo, HP, Dell and Apple
summary: Global PC shipments declined in Q2 as memory shortages constrained production, while major vendors navigated supply challenges with mixed results.
